verdict.answer_first: A states the answer in the first sentence: "To POST a JSON body with curl, set the `Content-Type` header and pass the body with `-d`"
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to a primary method before listing alternatives: "To POST a JSON body with curl..."
verdict.actionability: A is more actionable because it includes the common stdin piping example (`-d @-`) and a crucial note on shell quoting to prevent errors.
